summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Schedule View UI. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - Schedule nav appears in sidebar, Schedule view displays correctly, Create/Edit/Delete dialogs work, Pause/Resume/Run Now buttons work, brand filtering works, WebSocket shows Live badge.

issues: Minor: Cron preview for 'Mon-Fri at 9:00 AM' shows 'Mon at 9:00 AM' instead of full weekday range - cosmetic only, cron value is correct
Minor: Monthly preset shows raw cron '0 9 1 * *' instead of human-readable text - describeCron function doesn't handle monthly pattern

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/v1/schedule returns list of scheduled jobs
Backend: POST /api/v1/schedule creates a new scheduled job
Backend: POST /api/v1/schedule/:id/pause pauses an active job
Backend: POST /api/v1/schedule/:id/resume resumes a paused job
Frontend: Schedule nav item appears in sidebar with Timer icon
Frontend: Clicking Schedule nav shows the Schedule view
Frontend: Schedule view shows 'Scheduled Jobs' heading
Frontend: '+ New Job' button opens create dialog
Frontend: Create dialog has Job Name, Description, Brand, Schedule preset fields
Frontend: Create dialog shows cron preview text
Frontend: Creating a job refreshes the list
Frontend: Job cards show brand pill, name, description, cron description
Frontend: Pause button works on active jobs
Frontend: Resume button works on paused jobs
Frontend: Edit button opens edit dialog
Frontend: Delete button shows confirmation dialog
Frontend: Active/Paused sections group jobs correctly
Frontend: Brand filtering works on schedule view
Frontend: WebSocket shows Live badge in topbar
Frontend: Navigation to all views works (Overview, Approvals, Tasks, Inboxes, Schedule, Calendar, Activity)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: describeCron() function in ScheduleView.js doesn't handle monthly cron patterns (0 9 1 * *) - shows raw cron instead of 'Monthly on 1st at 9:00 AM'
Minor: describeCron() for Mon-Fri pattern (0 9 * * 1-5) shows 'Mon at 9:00 AM' instead of 'Mon-Fri at 9:00 AM' - the dow.split(',') doesn't handle range notation
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed schedule items during testing (8 items remain from previous test runs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Schedule View fully tested and working. All CRUD operations work: create, pause, resume, run-now, edit, delete. UI shows Active/Paused sections correctly. Brand filtering works. WebSocket real-time updates work. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_schedule_view.py covers all schedule endpoints. Minor cosmetic issues with cron description for monthly and Mon-Fri patterns - functionality is correct, just display text could be improved.
